name: Medusa
description: Medusa is a figure from Greek mythology, known for her hair of snakes and the power to turn anyone who gazes upon her into stone. She was once a beautiful mortal woman cursed by the goddess Athena for desecrating her temple. Medusa's tale is one of tragedy and terror, as she became a fearsome creature whose very appearance could petrify those who dared to look at her. She is often depicted as a symbol of both beauty and danger, embodying the duality of Greek mythology where even the most beautiful can harbor dark powers.
creator: KevinDigglepants96
